summary: Completed comprehensive testing of backend refactoring and new authority guide pages. All backend APIs working correctly after refactoring from 930-line server.py into modular routes. Three new guide pages verified: /guide/build-on-land-palm-bay, /guide/septic-vs-sewer-palm-bay, /guide/owner-financing-what-to-watch. PropertyDetail.jsx correctly shows unit-based utility info.
seed_data_creation: None - using existing 587 properties (582 inventory + 5 curated)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring verified working. All API endpoints remain the same (/api/properties, /api/leads, /api/chat, /api/contact, etc). Three new guide pages added with FAQPage JSON-LD schema. PropertyDetail.jsx uses unit number to determine utility type.

Authority Guide Pages./guide/build-on-land-palm-bay loads: PASS - Shows FAQ content, utility info, building costs
Authority Guide Pages./guide/owner-financing-what-to-watch loa: PASS - Shows 5 watch-out items, 25% min down, 35% deed transfer

Listings Page./listings shows 5 curated properties: PASS - Shows 5 properties with category filters

Property Detail Page.Unit-based utility info: PASS - Unit 8 (750 Firestone St NE) shows 'city water and city sewer'
Property Detail Page.Owner financing terms: PASS - Shows 25% minimum down, 35% deed transfer, no prepayment penalty
Property Detail Page.Old 10-20% language removed: PASS - Only 10% APR interest rate shown (correct)

Admin Panel.Dashboard stats: PASS - Shows 19 Leads, 5 Listings, 582 Inventory Lots
